title: antidesma nigricans
intro: Antidesma nigricans, also known as Black Mangosteen or Black Nightshade of Mangosteen, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in the Philippines, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Antidesma nigricans include the treatment of fever, diarrhea, and various skin conditions, as well as its potential in lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and can be consumed as a tea or added to other remedies.
